fields.label: Debug mode
fields.description: Enable verbose debug logging. Disable in production (live mode).

fields.label: Bridge enabled
fields.description: Master switch for the in-process meinchat bot bridge. When off, no message is ever ingested.

fields.label: Bot user email
fields.description: Email of the designated bot user (a real, findable meinchat user with role BOT, provisioned automatically). Any user can find this account in meinchat search and start a conversation with it; the bot replies in that conversation. Empty keeps the bridge inert.

fields.label: Bot nickname
fields.description: meinchat nickname the bot replies under, and how users find it in search.

fields.label: Bot conversation id (legacy)
fields.description: Optional legacy single-conversation id. No longer the trigger — the bot answers in any conversation it is a participant of. Leave empty.
